HGSS.064.0000:
Radio is good, you know?\f
Cool music and Pokémon information...
Surprising news and moving dramas...\r
It has everything!\f
The only thing missing would be images.\f
..................
Oops, they call that a TV!
HGSS.064.0001:
Lullabies on the radio make wild
Pokémon sleepy.\f
That’s why you don’t see many Pokémon
when the radio plays lullabies in the\r
tall grass.
HGSS.064.0002:
Why would they want to take over the
Radio Tower?
HGSS.064.0004:
Sorry. Authorized personnel only
beyond this point.\f
It wasn’t that way before. There’s
something wrong with the Director...
HGSS.064.0005:
Feel free to look around anywhere.
The Director is nice again, just as he\r
was before.
HGSS.064.0007:
Pokémon Talk with Professor Oak
The Hottest Show on the Air!
HGSS.064.0009:
Buena: Huh?
Today’s password?\f
HELP, of course!
HGSS.064.0010:
Buena: Hi! I’m Buena!\f
Do you know about the radio show
called Buena’s Password?\f
If you can tell me the password from
the program, you will earn points.\f
Save up those points and trade them
with that sweet young lady over there\r
for some choice prizes!\f
Here you go!
It’s your very own point card!\f
HGSS.064.0011:
Buena: Thank you for listening in
every day!\f
HGSS.064.0012:
Buena: [0103,0000,0000]!
Thank you for listening to my show!\f
HGSS.064.0013:
Buena: [0103,0000,0000]!
Thank you for listening in to my show!\f
HGSS.064.0014:
Buena: Do you remember today’s
password? [0200,0000]
HGSS.064.0015:
Buena: Oh, wow! Thank you!
What was your name again?\f
...[0103,0000,0000]!\f
Come on, [0103,0000,0000].
Join the show.\f
HGSS.064.0016:
Buena: Oh, wow! Thank you!
What was your name again?\f
...[0103,0000,0000]!\f
Come on, [0103,0000,0000].
Join the show.\f
HGSS.064.0017:
Buena: Thanks, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Please join the show like you always do!\f
HGSS.064.0018:
Buena: Thanks, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Please join the show like you always do!\f
HGSS.064.0019:
Buena: Come back after you listen to
my show, OK? Catch ya later!
HGSS.064.0020:
Buena: Everyone ready?\f
I want to hear you shout out today’s
password for [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.064.0021:
Buena: Everyone ready?\f
I want to hear you shout out today’s
password for [0103,0000,0000]!\f
HGSS.064.0022:
Buena: Yippee! That’s right!\f
You did tune in! I’m so happy!
You earned one point! Congratulations!\f
HGSS.064.0023:
Buena: Aww... That’s not it...
Did you forget the password?
HGSS.064.0024:
Buena: Oh! Your Blue Card reached 30
points today! That’s so wild!\f
Hmm... You came by so often,
[0103,0000,0000], I’ll make you a\r
special deal!\f
How would you like my phone number?\f
HGSS.064.0025:
Buena: Oh! Your Blue Card reached 30
points today! That’s so wild!\f
Hmm... You came by so often,
[0103,0000,0000], I’ll make you a\r
special deal!\f
How would you like my phone number?\f
HGSS.064.0027:
Buena: I look forward to hearing
from you!\f
HGSS.064.0028: Buena: Tune in to my password show!
HGSS.064.0029:
Buena: Sorry...
You get just one chance each day.\f
Come back tomorrow for another try!
HGSS.064.0032:
Buena: Tune in to my show again
tomorrow!\f
